questionHtml: State an assumption that Anita is making, in order to use a t-test.
markschemeHtml:
EITHER

The weights of the fish are distributed normally.          A1

OR

The variance of the two groups of fish is equal.          A1

[1 mark]

meta.title: State an assumption that Anita is making, in order to use a t-test.
